svg.title: PA4 TaskFlow architecture — roll 26100365
svg.desc: Left-to-right pipeline diagram for the TaskFlow Azure assignment. Shows four tiers: entry (GitHub and user), frontend (App Service), orchestration (Durable Function App), and backends (AKS validator, ACI report job, Blob Storage). ACR and Managed Identity shown as shared resources below.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the user interact with TaskFlow?')
sendPrompt('How is GitHub used for CI/CD in this assignment?')
sendPrompt('Why use App Service for the frontend in TaskFlow?')
sendPrompt('What does the HTTP starter function do?')
sendPrompt('How does the Durable orchestrator work?')
sendPrompt('Why use AKS for the validator in TaskFlow?')
sendPrompt('Why use ACI for the report job instead of AKS?')
sendPrompt('What gets written to blob storage?')
sendPrompt('What images are stored in ACR for this assignment?')
sendPrompt('How does the Managed Identity work with the Function App?')
